label: plain_text
text:
So far we have been saying
that when we fold a figure along a line of
symmetry, the two 1
parts overlap completely.
. We could also say
that
the part of the figure on one side of the line of symmetry is reflected
by the line to the other side; similarly, the part of the
e figure on the
other side of the line of symmetry is reflected to the first side! Let us
understand this by labeling
points on the figure.
some
